text: morning! already dreaming about your cold brew ☕
lol it's literally just a mason jar in the fridge, come get it
kitchen was insane tonight, 200 covers. completely wiped
200?? go to sleep babe. call tomorrow at 8?
always. love you 🌊
ok so you're here sat the 24th right? tide's low ~2pm, owen beach walk before dinner?
yes! train gets in 11:40. the siren for dinner?? been thinking about that fish & chips for a month
obviously the siren, i'll book us a table for the 24th
perfect. bringing the good hot sauce so marisol stops judging mine
she will judge anyway but i respect the commitment 😂
target run tonight? we're out of literally everything
yes 10pm? need oat milk + that popcorn we both like
adding it. also netflix charged me again, paypal me the $8?
sending it now sorry!! 🙏
got it. also the CR-V keys are in your bag still, need them back
oops yes!! on the hook by the door now
winco was a ZOO today but got everything for stir fry tonight
Good talking Sunday sweetheart. Did you eat a real breakfast today?
yes mom, café rosita burrito 😌
Good. I'm thinking I'll come up Nov 8, brunch at Rosita?
yes!! i'll make the reservation. so excited to see you
Wonderful. Talk Wednesday at 6. Love you.
love you! and tell anders to text me back lol
this meme is literally you during finals week
accurate and i hate it
how do i email a professor without sounding insane
short, polite, ask one clear thing. don't apologize 5 times. you got this
ok bet. also the dining hall ran out of waffles AGAIN
the waffle crisis continues. stay strong bro 🧇
journal club thurs — i picked the Sanford et al warming paper, pdf's in the drive
ooh good one. that's the one with the mussel thermal limits?
yep that one
love that paper, i'll bring snacks
anyone else weirdly nostalgic now that field season's done? miss the 5am titlow runs
i do NOT miss 5am but i miss the tide pools fr
reminder gear returns by friday, the waders especially 🙃
on it
tpu bill came, $84.20 total this month, splitting 3 ways = $28.07 each
sending mine now, thanks joon 🙏
paid. also whose turn is it for trash, it's overflowing
mine ugh, i'll take it down tonight
rent's due the 1st btw, gary emailed the reminder
Hows school. Money ok?
school's good dad! money's fine, stipend covers it. how's spokane
Cold already. Take care kid.
hey yolanda, dropping the waders back today, do they go in 214 or the gear closet?
gear closet, bottom shelf. thanks alex!
wait did you mean the 24th or 25th for the table? want to make sure i don't book my return wrong
dinner sat the 24th, you head back sun the 25th afternoon. i'll text the siren confirmation
also did you ever send that email? don't overthink it just hit send lol
tide window looks good for the morning survey
loggers pulled, data uploading now
sea star wasting looks lower at the north transect
can you double-check the salinity sheet
R keeps choking on the NA counts, looking into it
Chapter 3 draft is almost readable
Dr. Lindstrom wants the figures by Friday
meal prep tonight, taco bowls again
Portland this weekend, Kai is driving up
cold brew batch is steeping
campus loop was gorgeous, low fog off the Sound
pool was empty, got my laps in
Marisol found a chair at the thrift store
Anders passed his stats midterm
Mom says hi, calling Sunday
committee meeting moved to the afternoon
quadrat 47 had a huge anemone
chiton counts are up from last season
eelgrass is recovering at Owen Beach
warming signal is clearer in the May pull
